✦ Our Story ✦

Sivakasi's Finest Crackers

Sri Maruthi Pyrotech — the Sudharsana Chakkara Brand — is a trusted name from the fireworks capital of India. Premium quality sparklers, rockets, ground chakkars, aerial shots and gift boxes.

Every product from licensed manufacturers. Flat 50% discount. Light up your Diwali, New Year, Weddings with us.
